//: Root manifest of the <App> monorepo. Turborepo + pnpm workspaces, Node 22, TS 5.7. Every task delegates to `turbo run` so dependency ordering + caching live ONCE in turbo.json. Replace the @app/* scope with your org scope and the 'feature' module with your first bounded context.
name: app-harness
//packageManager: Pin the EXACT pnpm version so installs are reproducible across machines and CI. Bump deliberately.

pnpm.//overrides: Force transitive deps to patched versions to clear the high/critical audit gate (DoD). These are easy to forget when bumping deps — re-run `pnpm audit --audit-level high` after any upgrade. Examples shown; adjust to whatever advisories your tree has. Leave empty {} if none.

scripts.//scripts: Every gate verb is `turbo run <task>` so ordering (^build) + caching are declared in turbo.json, not duplicated per app. Only cross-cutting verbs that don't fit the task graph (e2e via playwright, db:* filters, stack:* docker compose) call tools directly.
scripts.stack:up:obs: docker compose -f compose.yaml -f compose.observability.yaml --profile observability up -d --wait
scripts.//prepare: `husky` here is what installs the git hooks on ANY `pnpm install` (fresh clones included). Without this, the DoD hooks silently never run.
